languages.text: "Мое семейство никак не могло возвести космопорт на Веабосе-6, капитан. Хотя бы потому, что родовой надел его — Янус".
"My house couldn't possibly have built a spaceport on Vheabos VI, Captain. Not least because our ancestral holdings are on Janus."
languages.original_text: "Мое семейство никак не могло возвести космопорт на Веабосе-6, капитан. Хотя бы потому, что родовой надел его — Янус".

traits.locale_text: "My house couldn't possibly have built a spaceport on Vheabos VI, Captain. Not least because our ancestral holdings are on Janus."
"My house couldn't possibly have built a spaceport on Vheabos VI, Captain. Not least because our ancestral holdings are on Janus."
"My house couldn't possibly have built a spaceport on Vheabos VI, Captain. Not least because our ancestral holdings are on Janus."

languages.text: «Mi casa no podría haber construido un espaciopuerto en Vheabos VI, capitán. Principalmente, porque nuestra tierra ancestral está en Janus».
languages.original_text: "My house couldn't possibly have built a spaceport on Vheabos VI, Captain. Not least because our ancestral holdings are on Janus."

traits.locale_text: «Mi casa no podría haber construido un espaciopuerto en Vheabos VI, capitán. Principalmente, porque nuestra tierra ancestral está en Janus».

languages.text: “我们家族不可能在维博斯六号星上建星港，上尉。更何况我们的祖传领地是在加努斯。”
languages.original_text: "My house couldn't possibly have built a spaceport on Vheabos VI, Captain. Not least because our ancestral holdings are on Janus."

traits.locale_text: “我们家族不可能在维博斯六号星上建星港，上尉。更何况我们的祖传领地是在加努斯。”

languages.text: « Ma maison n'a pas pu construire un spatioport sur Vhéabos-VI pour la simple raison que nos terres ancestrales se trouvent sur Janus. »
languages.original_text: "My house couldn't possibly have built a spaceport on Vheabos VI, Captain. Not least because our ancestral holdings are on Janus."

traits.locale_text: « Ma maison n'a pas pu construire un spatioport sur Vhéabos-VI pour la simple raison que nos terres ancestrales se trouvent sur Janus. »

languages.text: "Hanem, Vheabos VI'da bir uzay limanı inşa etmiş olamaz Yüzbaşı. En azından ata yadigârı mülklerimiz Janus'ta olduğundan bu mümkün değil."
languages.original_text: "My house couldn't possibly have built a spaceport on Vheabos VI, Captain. Not least because our ancestral holdings are on Janus."

traits.locale_text: "Hanem, Vheabos VI'da bir uzay limanı inşa etmiş olamaz Yüzbaşı. En azından ata yadigârı mülklerimiz Janus'ta olduğundan bu mümkün değil."

languages.text: "Mein Haus hätte auf Vheabos-VI unmöglich einen Raumhafen errichten können, Captain. Nicht zuletzt, weil sich unser Stammsitz auf Janus befindet."
languages.original_text: "My house couldn't possibly have built a spaceport on Vheabos VI, Captain. Not least because our ancestral holdings are on Janus."

traits.locale_text: "Mein Haus hätte auf Vheabos-VI unmöglich einen Raumhafen errichten können, Captain. Nicht zuletzt, weil sich unser Stammsitz auf Janus befindet."

languages.text: 「私の家では、ヴェアボスの6号に宇宙港を建設することは不可能です。船長、特に祖先が所有する土地がヤヌスにあるからです。」
languages.original_text: "My house couldn't possibly have built a spaceport on Vheabos VI, Captain. Not least because our ancestral holdings are on Janus."

traits.locale_text: 「私の家では、ヴェアボスの6号に宇宙港を建設することは不可能です。船長、特に祖先が所有する土地がヤヌスにあるからです。」
